pricing.title: Highly competitive rates,
pricing.subtitle: A model for every product type — subscription for physical, commission for the rest.
pricing.commissionGroupLabel: Digital, services, courses & art — no subscription
pricing.footnote: Physical subscriptions in USD ($25 / $49 / $79). Automatic conversion to your local currency at checkout. 10% commission only on completed sales for digital products, courses, services and artist works.

physicalPremium.desc: Advanced ops: AI, automations, multi-warehouses and dedicated support.

commission.name: Digital, services, courses & artist works
commission.desc: For the other 4 commerce systems: commission only on successful sales.
